question:
Will Gemini 3.0 be released on November 18 2025?

Description: This market will resolve according to the date (ET) Google's Gemini 3.0 model is made available to the general public.

For this market to resolve to "Yes," Gemini 3.0 must be launched and publicly accessible, including via open beta or open rolling waitlist signups. A closed beta or any form of private access will not suffice. The release must be clearly defined and publicly announced by Google as being accessible to the general public.

Gemini 3.0 refers to a product explicitly named Gemini 3.0 (e.g. Gemini 3.0 pro would count), or one that is recognized as a successor to Gemini 2.0, similar to the progression from Gemini 1.0 to Gemini 2.0. Products labeled as Gemini 2.5 or similar will not count for this market's resolution.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Google, with additional verification from a consensus of credible reporting.

evidences.title: Gemini 3.0: Google's Newest AI Model Coming Soon | AI Hub
evidences.content: ‍ Here’s how these models compare in the benchmarks so far: ‍ | Benchmark | Gemini 3.0 (lithiumflow)\ | Gemini 3.0 (orionmist)\ | Gemini 2.5 Pro | Claude Opus 4.1 | Claude 3.7 Sonnet | --- --- --- | | SimpleBench | 80-100% | 80-100% | 62.4% | 60.0% | 46.4% | ‍ ## When is Gemini 3.0 Release Date? Gemini 3.0 is likely to be released in November or December of 2025. Here's what we know so far: ‍ [...] ‍ 1. Google has confirmed Gemini 3.0 will launch in 2025, but hasn't provided a specific date. 2. Historically, Google releases new Gemini versions in December. This pattern suggests a late 2025 launch window, though the company may break from tradition this year. 3. Rumors circulated in October claiming the model would drop on October 22, but that date came and went without a release. More recent speculation points to a launch window between November 15 and December 5, though these remain unverified claims. ‍ ## What Can We Expect From Gemini 3.0? Experts believe that Gemini 3.0 will improve in reasoning and coding, as well as agent-like functionality. However, we should temper our expectations and not anticipate a generational leap. ‍ [...] ‍ ### Will Gemini 3.0 have image generatio...

evidences.title: Google Gemini 3.0: Features, Changes and Release Date!
evidences.content: Well, everyone, you might be thinking, with a Google Gemini 3 model, when could Google actually go through and release some sort of updated model to Google Gemini 2.5? Now, here's the thing. Number one, for a release date or when Google could go through and release something like this, we have to kind of look back at their previous models that they've made. Now, starting off with Google Bard when that first came out, that came out in March 2023. Google Gemini 1.0 0 basically came out December 2023. Then we got 2.0 December 2024 and you know using the same type of versioning we could expect Google Gemini 3.0 or that third model to come out sometime December 2025. So sometime this particular year we could be getting that 3.0 model which is going to be a pretty big jump up I would say for [...] # Google Gemini 3.0: Features, Changes and Release Date! ## Simple Alpaca 633000 subscribers 31 likes ### Description 3786 views Posted: 23 Jul 2025 Get The Cheapest iPhones Here: Get The Cheapest Androids Here: Wallpapers I Use In My Videos Here: Follow Me On Twitter: GEAR I USE IN MY VIDEOS!: Instagram: Snapchat: SimpleAlpaca Cheap Prices For iPhones: Get The iPhone 16 Pro Here: Get The iP...

evidences.title: Gemini for Google Cloud release notes | Google Cloud Documentation
evidences.content: Enabled contextualization in responses by incorporating a set of basic user data and their environment data into the prompts. Also, expanded data sources for grounding and improved response accuracy via RAG. The Code Transformation features in Gemini Code Assist are now available in Public Preview for Cloud Shell. For more information, see Use Code Transformation features. Gemini in Security Command Center is released to General Availability. For more information, see Gemini features in Security Command Center. The Transform Code features in Gemini Code Assist are now available in Public Preview for Workstations and Cloud Shell. [...] ## July 17, 2024 Available now in Preview, you can enable the collection and storage of user input, contextual information, and responses when you use Gemini for Google Cloud. For more information, see View Gemini for Google Cloud logs. ## July 16, 2024 Database Center, which is part of Gemini in Databases, now has the following features in Public Preview: For more information, see Database Center release notes. ## July 10, 2024 The following Gemini in Looker features are now available in Public Preview: Learn more about Gemini in Looker and how to...

evidences.title: Vertex AI release notes | Google Cloud Documentation
evidences.content: Agent monitoring Feature Gemini Live API is now available as a public preview offering and has been updated with the following features: Support for responses in 8 voices and 31 languages using Chirp 3 Updated UI support in Vertex AI Studio Expanded conversation session window Ability to extend conversation sessions Support to share your current screen with Gemini during conversations Transcription support for audio in and audio out Support to change or update the system instructions mid-session For more information, see Gemini 2.0 Flash Live API. Feature Agent Development Kit (ADK) is now available in Preview. For more information, see Agent Development Kit. Feature [...] Generative AI on Vertex AI v1 Feature Cloud API Registry is available in the Google Cloud console in Preview. Use Cloud API Registry in the Google Cloud console to view and manage the MCP servers and tools your agent has access to. Feature Gemini 3 Flash Gemini 3 Flash is now available in public preview. This model is designed to tackle the most challenging agentic problems with strong coding and state-of-the-art reasoning capabilities, and is our best model for complex multimodal understanding. For more infor...

evidences.title: Gemini Enterprise release notes | Google Cloud Documentation
evidences.content: ## July 31, 2025 Gemini Enterprise: General Availability Gemini Enterprise is generally available (GA). Gemini Enterprise: Enhanced analytics The Analytics page has been enhanced with improvements and additions. See View analytics data. Updated user interface to include improved metrics visualization. New metrics to track the adoption, usage and quality, agent, and value data of an app. Gemini Enterprise: Data stores that connect third-party data sources using data federation (Preview) You can connect to these third-party data sources with data federation: Support for these data sources is in Public Preview. Gemini Enterprise: Alerts for third-party data stores You can enable alerts for predefined tasks in your third-party data stores. [...] This feature is generally available (GA) and accessible only through the API. For more information, see Exclude HTML content. ## June 03, 2025 Gemini Enterprise: Adjust autocomplete settings to reduce risk of PII leaks (Preview) If you use either the search history or user events model for autocomplete suggestions and you have concerns about your users entering their personally identifiable information (PII) as search queries, then see Reduc...

evidences.title: Gemini 3 Flash is now available in Gemini CLI - Google Developers Blog
evidences.content: ## Start using Gemini 3 Flash with Gemini CLI Starting today, most paid tier customers of Gemini CLI have access to both Gemini 3 Pro and Gemini 3 Flash, including: All non-business customers of Google AI Pro or AI Ultra Users who have access using a paid API key through Google AI or Vertex Gemini Code Assist users that have been enabled by their cloud admin for preview models For free tier users: We’ve onboarded everyone who signed up to the previously available waitlist, so please check your email for details If you were not on our waitlist, we’re rolling out additional access gradually to ensure the experience remains fast and reliable, so stay tuned for more details, or view our docs to learn about your options for access now [...] Get started by upgrading Gemini CLI version to the latest version (0.21.1): ``` npm install -g @google/gemini-cli@latest ``` Plain text Copied After you’ve confirmed your version is 0.21.1 or later, run `/settings`, then toggle the setting “Preview features” to true. Once you’ve enabled preview features, run `/model` to select Gemini 3. GeminiCLI_model_selector This release brings the full capabilities of the Gemini 3 family to your terminal. You...

evidences.title: Get started with Gemini 3 | Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform
evidences.content: This table summarizes the core new features and parameters available, along with direct links to their detailed documentation: | New Feature/API Change | Documentation | --- | | Model: `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` | Model card Model Garden | | Thinking level | Thinking | | Media resolution | Image understanding Video understanding Audio understanding Document understanding | | Thought signature | Thought signatures | | Temperature | API reference | | Multimodal function responses | Function calling: Multimodal function responses | | Streaming function calling | Function calling: Streaming function calling | `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` ### Thinking level [...] #### Other thinking levels Gemini 3 Flash introduces two new thinking levels: `MINIMAL` and `MEDIUM` to give you even more control over how the model handles complex reasoning tasks. `MINIMAL` `MEDIUM` `MINIMAL` offers close-to-zero thinking budget options for tasks optimized for throughput, rather than reasoning. `MEDIUM` allows for a balance between speed and reasoning that allows for some reasoning capability but still prioritizes low-latency operations. `MINIMAL` `MEDIUM` ## New API features Gemini 3 introduces powerful API en...

evidences.title: 5 things to try with Gemini 3 Pro in Gemini CLI
evidences.content: Gemini 3 Pro is available starting now in Gemini CLI for Google AI Ultra subscribers (Google AI Ultra for Business access is on the roadmap) and for those who have access via paid Gemini API key. For Gemini Code Assist Enterprise users, access is coming soon. All other users, including Google AI Pro, Gemini Code Assist Standard, and free tier users can join the waitlist here to get access as it becomes available. You can also track our rollout progress by following this GitHub discussion. ## Start using Gemini 3 Pro with Gemini CLI If you’re a Google AI Ultra subscriber or have a paid Gemini API key, get started immediately by upgrading your Gemini CLI version to 0.16.x: ``` npm install -g @google/gemini-cli@latest ``` Shell Copied [...] "This is an application that does not have any documentation and we do not have a technical writer. Before you begin, review all of the code. Then make me a user documentation. This document should only explain user facing features, but make sure to explain every single feature such as usage of the app, command line options, authentication options, built in tools, and all other user facing features. For certain features such as MCP or extensions...

evidences.title: Introducing Code Wiki: Accelerating your code understanding
evidences.content: We’re building a Gemini CLI extension for Code Wiki so teams can run the same system locally and securely on internal repositories. Join the waitlist for the Gemini CLI extension. ## The future of development is here Developers should spend their time building, not deciphering. The era of manual, outdated documentation and endless code-reading is over. The future of development is about instant understanding. Start now at codewiki.google.
